# Chess Coach

> AI-coached chess game for practice with coaching feedback.

## Product

- [Home](https://chess.significanthobbies.com/): Play (SPA)

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://chess.significanthobbies.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://chess.significanthobbies.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://chess.significanthobbies.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
